person.name: Robert VI d'Auvergne
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Il servit le Roi Philippe "Le bel" dans la guerre de flandre et se signala par son courage à la Bataille de Courtray en 1302. Il testa en 1314 donnant à l'abbaye du Bouchet une rente annuelle de trente setiers de froment pour l'anniversaire de son frère Guillaume.
Sources :
- Comte A. de Remacle, Dictionnaire Généalogique des Familles d'Auvergne T 1 p 118 ;
relevé JPR Teyssier Chalancon Mangas

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert VI d'Auvergne於1245年出生時，他的父親Robert V d'Auvergne18歲，母親Eléonore de Baffie25歲。他和Béatrice de Montgascon至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1318年享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert VI d'Auvergne was born in 1245, his father, Robert V d'Auvergne, was 18 and his mother, Eléonore de Baffie, was 25. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Béatrice de Montgascon. He died in 1318, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert VI d'Auvergne est né en 1245, son père, Robert V d'Auvergne, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Eléonore de Baffie, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Béatrice de Montgascon. Il est décédé en 1318, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert VI d'Auvergne 1245 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert V d'Auvergne 18 und seine Mutter Eléonore de Baffie 25. Er hatte mit Béatrice de Montgascon mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1318 im Alter von 73 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert VI d'Auvergne è nato il nel 1245, il suo padre, Robert V d'Auvergne, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Eléonore de Baffie, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Béatrice de Montgascon. Morì nel 1318, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert VI d'Auvergneが1245年に生まれた時，父Robert V d'Auvergneは18歳，母Eléonore de Baffieは25歳であった。彼はBéatrice de Montgasconとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1318年に73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert VI d'Auvergne(이)가 1245년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert V d'Auvergne(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Eléonore de Baffie(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Béatrice de Montgascon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert VI d'Auvergne nasceu em 1245, seu pai, Robert V d'Auvergne, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Eléonore de Baffie, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Béatrice de Montgascon. Ele faleceu em 1318, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert VI d'Auvergne родился в 1245 г., его отцу по имени Robert V d'Auvergne было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Eléonore de Baffie, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Béatrice de Montgascon. Он умер в 1318 г. в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert VI d'Auvergne nació en 1245, su papá, Robert V d'Auvergne, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Eléonore de Baffie, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Béatrice de Montgascon. Murió en 1318, a la edad de 73 años.
